```{=html}
<svg class="sched-anim" viewBox="0 0 760 224" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:100%;max-width:900px;height:auto;display:block;margin:0.4em auto">
<g class="fragment" data-fragment-index="1">
<circle cx="215" cy="52" r="7" fill="#3B7EA1"/>
<circle cx="720" cy="52" r="7" fill="#9C162A"/>
<text x="215.0" y="32" text-anchor="middle" fill="#3B7EA1" font-size="19" font-style="italic">p<tspan baseline-shift="sub" font-size="0.7em" font-style="normal">0</tspan></text>
<text x="720.0" y="32" text-anchor="middle" fill="#9C162A" font-size="19" font-style="italic">p<tspan baseline-shift="sub" font-size="0.7em" font-style="normal">target</tspan></text>
</g>
<g class="fragment" data-fragment-index="2">
<line x1="215" y1="52" x2="720" y2="52" stroke="#33474B" stroke-width="2"/>
<path d="M 460 45 L 476 52 L 460 59 Z" fill="#33474B"/>
</g>
<g class="fragment" data-fragment-index="3">
<line class="" x1="215.0" y1="115.0" x2="215.0" y2="141.0" stroke="#8A9AA0" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
<line class="" x1="265.5" y1="115.0" x2="265.5" y2="141.0" stroke="#8A9AA0" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
<line class="" x1="316.0" y1="115.0" x2="316.0" y2="141.0" stroke="#8A9AA0" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
<line class="" x1="366.5" y1="115.0" x2="366.5" y2="141.0" stroke="#8A9AA0" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
<line class="" x1="417.0" y1="115.0" x2="417.0" y2="141.0" stroke="#8A9AA0" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
<line class="" x1="467.5" y1="115.0" x2="467.5" y2="141.0" stroke="#8A9AA0" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
<line class="" x1="518.0" y1="115.0" x2="518.0" y2="141.0" stroke="#8A9AA0" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
<line class="" x1="568.5" y1="115.0" x2="568.5" y2="141.0" stroke="#8A9AA0" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
<line class="" x1="619.0" y1="115.0" x2="619.0" y2="141.0" stroke="#8A9AA0" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
<line class="" x1="669.5" y1="115.0" x2="669.5" y2="141.0" stroke="#8A9AA0" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
<line class="" x1="720.0" y1="115.0" x2="720.0" y2="141.0" stroke="#8A9AA0" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
<text x="191" y="133" text-anchor="end" fill="#8A9AA0" font-size="14">naive: uniform schedule</text>
</g>
<g class="fragment" data-fragment-index="4" id="sched-optrow">
<line class="opt-tick" x1="215.0" y1="177.0" x2="215.0" y2="203.0" stroke="#23373B" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round" data-u="215.0" data-c="215.0"/>
<line class="opt-tick" x1="265.5" y1="177.0" x2="265.5" y2="203.0" stroke="#23373B" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round" data-u="265.5" data-c="296.6"/>
<line class="opt-tick" x1="316.0" y1="177.0" x2="316.0" y2="203.0" stroke="#23373B" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round" data-u="316.0" data-c="364.2"/>
<line class="opt-tick" x1="366.5" y1="177.0" x2="366.5" y2="203.0" stroke="#23373B" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round" data-u="366.5" data-c="416.7"/>
<line class="opt-tick" x1="417.0" y1="177.0" x2="417.0" y2="203.0" stroke="#23373B" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round" data-u="417.0" data-c="452.4"/>
<line class="opt-tick" x1="467.5" y1="177.0" x2="467.5" y2="203.0" stroke="#23373B" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round" data-u="467.5" data-c="467.5"/>
<line class="opt-tick" x1="518.0" y1="177.0" x2="518.0" y2="203.0" stroke="#23373B" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round" data-u="518.0" data-c="482.6"/>
<line class="opt-tick" x1="568.5" y1="177.0" x2="568.5" y2="203.0" stroke="#23373B" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round" data-u="568.5" data-c="518.3"/>
<line class="opt-tick" x1="619.0" y1="177.0" x2="619.0" y2="203.0" stroke="#23373B" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round" data-u="619.0" data-c="570.8"/>
<line class="opt-tick" x1="669.5" y1="177.0" x2="669.5" y2="203.0" stroke="#23373B" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round" data-u="669.5" data-c="638.4"/>
<line class="opt-tick" x1="720.0" y1="177.0" x2="720.0" y2="203.0" stroke="#23373B" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round" data-u="720.0" data-c="720.0"/>
<text x="191" y="195" text-anchor="end" fill="#23373B" font-size="14" font-weight="500">optimal: ?</text>
</g>
</svg>
```
